auth.logoutMock: Mockup: logged out. (No real auth yet.)
auth.notFoundMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Scan the QR code on your MeUp device again.
auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your MeUp products.
auth.register.title: Create account
auth.register.subtitle: Sign up with your email to get started.
auth.error.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.error.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.error.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.error.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
auth.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
verify.page.successBody: Your email has been verified successfully.
verify.page.failBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify.banner.message: Your email is not verified yet.
verify.banner.sent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
verify.banner.error: Could not send. Please try again later.
home.title: Manage vocabulary on MeUp
home.subtitle: Language pair comes from your device QR code — change it below if needed.
languagePair.title: Language pair
languagePair.subtitle: Source language (what you already know) and study language (what you want to learn).
languagePair.nativeHint: For meanings; sets the UI language
languagePair.studyHint: The language you want to learn vocabulary in
languagePair.sameWarning: Both languages are the same — pick different languages to study effectively.
products.my.title: My products
products.my.description: View and manage vocabulary sets you created or are studying.
products.new.title: Create new product
products.new.description: Design a new vocabulary set with card templates and playback sequence.
products.explore.title: Explore products
products.explore.description: Browse community products and system packages.
products.emptyOwned: You have no products for this language pair yet.
products.emptyRequests: No vocabulary create requests for this language pair yet.
products.errorGeneric: Could not load products. Please try again.
products.settings.title: Product settings
products.settings.subtitle: Update marketplace info. Public products appear on Explore.
products.settings.shareModeHint: Public products can be purchased on Explore. Private products are only visible to you.
products.settings.creditPriceHint: 0 means free. Buyers pay this amount in credits.
products.settings.validation.creditPrice: Enter a valid price (0 or greater).
products.settings.error.generic: Could not save settings. Please try again.
products.settings.error.invalid_request: Invalid settings — check name and price.
products.settings.error.forbidden: You are not the owner of this product.
explore.errorGeneric: Could not load the catalog. Please try again.
explore.empty: No public products for this language pair yet.
explore.purchase.error.already_has_acces: You already have access to this product.
explore.purchase.error.cannot_purchase_o: You cannot buy your own product.
createHub.title: How do you want to create?
createHub.subtitle: Enter vocabulary yourself or let AI generate it — each path uses the same card layout and export flow.
createHub.aiSoonBody: This AI flow will call product-create with a vocab job (fromTitle, fromParagraph, or fromImage). UI and API wiring are next.
createHub.manual.title: Enter manually
createHub.manual.description: Design schema, cards, and type each vocabulary row — same wizard as today.
createHub.aiTitle.title: Generate from topic
createHub.aiTitle.description: Enter a theme (e.g. Travel) — AI suggests a vocabulary list.
createHub.aiParagraph.title: Extract from text
createHub.aiParagraph.description: Paste a paragraph — AI picks useful words and meanings.
createHub.aiImage.title: Generate from image
createHub.aiImage.description: Upload a photo — AI reads it and builds vocabulary.
createAiTitle.setup.title: Generate from topic
createAiTitle.setup.hint: AI will create vocabulary rows from your topic using a vocab job (fromTitle).
createAiTitle.setup.wordCountHint: You choose how many words to generate (minimum {min}, maximum {max}). Sent as job limitCount.
createAiTitle.setup.creditsEstimate: Estimated vocab job cost: ~{credits} credits (server calculates final amount).
createAiTitle.schema.hint: Choose columns for generated rows. Default card layout is applied automatically.
createAiTitle.review.title: Confirm & generate
createAiTitle.review.hint: Submitting sends POST /api/product-create with items: [] and one vocab job.
createAiTitle.review.mediaNote: If schema includes text+audio or hasImage, the server may add TTS/image jobs after vocabulary is generated (extra credits).
createAiTitle.done.processingHint: Polling job progress — this may take a minute.
createAiTitle.done.successHint: Vocabulary request finished. Your product will appear in My products when packaging completes.
createAiTitle.validation.wordCountRequir: Please enter how many words to generate.
createAiTitle.error.insufficient_credits: Not enough credits for this job.
createAiTitle.error.invalid_request: Invalid request — check language pair and schema.
createAiParagraph.setup.title: Extract from text
createAiParagraph.setup.hint: Paste a paragraph — AI picks vocabulary using a vocab job (fromParagraph).
createAiParagraph.setup.paragraphPlaceho: Paste or type the source text here…
createAiParagraph.schema.hint: Choose columns for extracted words. Default card layout is applied automatically.
createAiParagraph.review.title: Confirm & extract
createAiParagraph.review.hint: Submitting sends POST /api/product-create with items: [] and one fromParagraph vocab job.
createAiParagraph.done.processingHint: Polling job progress — this may take a minute.
createAiParagraph.done.successHint: Extraction finished. Your product will appear in My products when packaging completes.
createAiParagraph.validation.paragraphRe: Please paste or enter a paragraph.
createAiImage.setup.title: Generate from image
createAiImage.setup.hint: Upload a photo — it is resized and compressed before sending as a fromImage vocab job.
createAiImage.setup.imageHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF up to 20 MB. Optimized to JPEG (max ~1280px, target ≤1.5 MB) before upload.
createAiImage.schema.hint: Choose columns for words detected in the image. Default card layout is applied automatically.
createAiImage.review.title: Confirm & generate
createAiImage.review.hint: Submitting sends compressed base64 in a fromImage vocab job (items: []).
createAiImage.done.processingHint: Polling job progress — this may take a minute.
createAiImage.done.successHint: Image job finished. Your product will appear in My products when packaging completes.
createAiImage.validation.unsupportedType: Unsupported format — use JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF.
createAiImage.validation.compressFailed: Could not optimize this image. Try another file.
placeholder.products.title: My products
placeholder.products.description: Your product list will appear here — filtered by language pair, SRS progress, etc.
placeholder.explore.title: Explore products
placeholder.explore.description: Community product library and system packages will appear here.
createProgram.stepName.title: Create program
createProgram.stepName.label: Program name
createProgram.stepSchema.title: Card field structure
createProgram.stepSchema.hint: Each row is a text column. Choose Text or Text + Audio — audio slots are derived on export (API format). Image is one toggle for the whole program.
createProgram.stepSchema.hasImageHint: One image slot per vocabulary row (API hasImage flag).
createProgram.stepDone.title: Vocabulary request submitted
createProgram.stepDone.subtitle: Request finished — server is packaging your program.
createProgram.stepDone.submittingHint: Creating request and waiting for the job runner.
createProgram.validation.fieldsRequired: Each field needs a name and at least one schema row.
createProgram.validation.schemaLangRequi: Schema needs at least one preset field with native or study lang (studyText / nativeText).
createProgram.stepCardSetup.title: Levels and cards
createProgram.stepCardSetup.hint: One SRS level by default — add levels if needed. Use ←/→ to shift boundaries like on the MeUp device.
createProgram.stepCardSetup.previewHint: Select a face on the right to preview it.
createProgram.stepSide.playbackHint: Drag to reorder · tap ✕ to delete
createProgram.stepSide.playbackEmpty: No playback steps yet — add play or pause.
createProgram.preview.tapToEdit: Tap a region on the card to edit details
createProgram.preview.clickToEdit: Click a region on the card to edit details
createProgram.preview.dragHint: Tap another region to switch · drag body to move · drag corners to resize
createProgram.preview.dragHintDesktop: Click another region to switch · drag body to move · drag corners to resize
createProgram.stepDisplay.previewLabelHi: Leave empty to show the field name in preview.
createProgram.stepDisplay.outstandingCol: Wrap highlighted text in [[ and ]] — brackets are hidden on the card.
createProgram.validation.sidesRequired: Each level needs at least one card face.
createProgram.validation.vocabEmpty: Add at least one vocabulary row.
createProgram.validation.vocabRequiredFi: Each row must fill all text fields shown on the card.
createProgram.validation.vocabRequiredMe: Each row must include image/audio files used on the card or in playback.
createProgram.validation.csvNoDataRows: No vocabulary rows found — check headers and data below the header row.
createProgram.validation.csvNoMappedColu: No columns match your schema. Use the downloaded template or match column headers to field names.
createProgram.validation.csvImportConfir: Replace all existing rows with the CSV import? Choose Cancel to append instead.
createProgram.validation.csvImportFailed: Could not read the CSV file.
createProgram.stepVocab.title: Enter vocabulary
createProgram.stepVocab.hint: Each row is one card item. Select a row to preview — use [[highlights]] in text cells. Add image/audio in the media panel below.
createProgram.stepVocab.previewEmpty: Add a row to preview the card.
createProgram.stepVocab.noTextFields: No text fields in schema — go back and add text columns.
createProgram.stepVocab.csvHint: Text columns only. Header row must match field names in your schema (use the template).
createProgram.stepVocab.mediaHint: Files stay in the browser until upload API is connected. Preview uses local files.
